strategy: Defender X (64,000 HP) blocks the northeast exit to Mt. Gagazet. It has no elemental weakness and is immune to Demi and most status ailments — raw damage only. Open with Haste/Hastega on the party, then Auron's Armor Break (not immune) to strip its high Defence. Use Provoke on Auron or Kimahri to redirect Defender X's attacks away from weaker party members. Heal with Yuna as needed. Steal Lunar Curtains (useful for armoring). Note: Mighty Guard is NOT learned via Lancet here — pick it up from Biran Ronso at Mt. Gagazet instead.
